mapper.select: SELECT (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM `user` WHERE deleted = 0 AND cancel_status = 0) AS totalUsers, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM `user` WHERE deleted = 0 AND cancel_status = 0 AND DATE(register_time) = CURDATE()) AS todayRegister, (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT user_id) FROM ( SELECT user_id FROM post WHERE DATE(create_time) = CURDATE() AND deleted = 0 UNION SELECT user_id FROM comment WHERE DATE(create_time) = CURDATE() AND deleted = 0 UNION SELECT user_id FROM like_collect WHERE DATE(create_time) = CURDATE() ) t) AS dau, (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT user_id) FROM ( SELECT user_id FROM post WHERE create_time >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 30 DAY) AND deleted = 0 UNION SELECT user_id FROM comment WHERE create_time >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 30 DAY) AND deleted = 0 UNION SELECT user_id FROM like_collect WHERE create_time >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 30 DAY) ) t) AS mau, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM post WHERE deleted = 0) AS totalPosts, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM post WHERE deleted = 0 AND DATE(create_time) = CURDATE()) AS todayPosts, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM like_collect WHERE type = 1) AS totalInteractions, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM report WHERE status = 0) AS pendingReports

SELECT DATE(register_time) AS date, COUNT(*) AS value FROM `user` WHERE deleted = 0 AND cancel_status = 0 AND register_time >= #{startDate} AND register_time < DATE_ADD(#{endDate}, INTERVAL 1 DAY) GROUP BY DATE(register_time) ORDER BY date ASC

SELECT d.date, COALESCE(t.cnt, 0) AS value FROM ( SELECT DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL n DAY) AS date FROM (SELECT 0 n UNION SELECT 1 UNION SELECT 2 UNION SELECT 3 UNION SELECT 4 UNION SELECT 5 UNION SELECT 6 UNION SELECT 7 UNION SELECT 8 UNION SELECT 9 UNION SELECT 10 UNION SELECT 11 UNION SELECT 12 UNION SELECT 13 UNION SELECT 14 UNION SELECT 15 UNION SELECT 16 UNION SELECT 17 UNION SELECT 18 UNION SELECT 19 UNION SELECT 20 UNION SELECT 21 UNION SELECT 22 UNION SELECT 23 UNION SELECT 24 UNION SELECT 25 UNION SELECT 26 UNION SELECT 27 UNION SELECT 28 UNION SELECT 29) nums WHERE DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL n DAY) BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate} ) d LEFT JOIN ( SELECT DATE(action_time) AS dt, COUNT(DISTINCT user_id) AS cnt FROM ai_user_log WHERE action_time >= #{startDate} AND action_time < DATE_ADD(#{endDate}, INTERVAL 1 DAY) GROUP BY DATE(action_time) ) t ON d.date = t.dt ORDER BY d.date ASC

SELECT DATE(create_time) AS date, COUNT(*) AS value FROM post WHERE deleted = 0 AND create_time >= #{startDate} AND create_time < DATE_ADD(#{endDate}, INTERVAL 1 DAY) GROUP BY DATE(create_time) ORDER BY date ASC

SELECT d.date, COALESCE(lk.cnt, 0) AS likeCount, COALESCE(cm.cnt, 0) AS commentCount, COALESCE(cl.cnt, 0) AS collectCount FROM ( SELECT DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL n DAY) AS date FROM (SELECT 0 n UNION SELECT 1 UNION SELECT 2 UNION SELECT 3 UNION SELECT 4 UNION SELECT 5 UNION SELECT 6 UNION SELECT 7 UNION SELECT 8 UNION SELECT 9 UNION SELECT 10 UNION SELECT 11 UNION SELECT 12 UNION SELECT 13 UNION SELECT 14 UNION SELECT 15 UNION SELECT 16 UNION SELECT 17 UNION SELECT 18 UNION SELECT 19 UNION SELECT 20 UNION SELECT 21 UNION SELECT 22 UNION SELECT 23 UNION SELECT 24 UNION SELECT 25 UNION SELECT 26 UNION SELECT 27 UNION SELECT 28 UNION SELECT 29) nums WHERE DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL n DAY) BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate} ) d LEFT JOIN ( SELECT DATE(create_time) AS dt, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM like_collect WHERE create_time >= #{startDate} AND create_time < DATE_ADD(#{endDate}, INTERVAL 1 DAY) GROUP BY DATE(create_time) ) lk ON d.date = lk.dt LEFT JOIN ( SELECT DATE(create_time) AS dt, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM comment WHERE deleted = 0 AND create_time >= #{startDate} AND create_time < DATE_ADD(#{endDate}, INTERVAL 1 DAY) GROUP BY DATE(create_time) ) cm ON d.date = cm.dt LEFT JOIN ( SELECT DATE(create_time) AS dt, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM like_collect WHERE type = 3 AND create_time >= #{startDate} AND create_time < DATE_ADD(#{endDate}, INTERVAL 1 DAY) GROUP BY DATE(create_time) ) cl ON d.date = cl.dt ORDER BY d.date ASC

SELECT c.id AS circleId, c.name AS name, COALESCE(c.member_count, 0) AS memberCount, COALESCE(p.postCount, 0) AS postCount, COALESCE(p.interactionCount, 0)AS interactionCount FROM circle c LEFT JOIN ( SELECT circle_id, COUNT(*) AS postCount, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM like_collect lc WHERE lc.target_id = post.id AND lc.type = 1) + (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM comment cm WHERE cm.post_id = post.id AND cm.deleted = 0) + (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM like_collect lc2 WHERE lc2.target_id = post.id AND lc2.type = 3) AS interactionCount FROM post WHERE deleted = 0 GROUP BY circle_id ) p ON c.id = p.circle_id WHERE c.deleted = 0 AND c.status = 1 ORDER BY interactionCount DESC, postCount DESC LIMIT #{limit}
SELECT DATE(create_time) AS date, COUNT(*) AS value FROM report WHERE create_time >= #{startDate} AND create_time < DATE_ADD(#{endDate}, INTERVAL 1 DAY) GROUP BY DATE(create_time) ORDER BY date ASC
SELECT COALESCE(report_type, '未分类') AS type, COUNT(*) AS count FROM report GROUP BY report_type ORDER BY count DESC

SELECT d.hour, COALESCE(p.cnt, 0) AS postCount, COALESCE(c.cnt, 0) AS commentCount, COALESCE(lk.cnt, 0) AS likeCount, COALESCE(p.cnt, 0) + COALESCE(c.cnt, 0) + COALESCE(lk.cnt, 0) AS total FROM ( SELECT CONCAT(LPAD(h, 2, '0'), ':00-', LPAD(h + 1, 2, '0'), ':00') AS hour, h AS h FROM (SELECT 0 h UNION SELECT 1 UNION SELECT 2 UNION SELECT 3 UNION SELECT 4 UNION SELECT 5 UNION SELECT 6 UNION SELECT 7 UNION SELECT 8 UNION SELECT 9 UNION SELECT 10 UNION SELECT 11 UNION SELECT 12 UNION SELECT 13 UNION SELECT 14 UNION SELECT 15 UNION SELECT 16 UNION SELECT 17 UNION SELECT 18 UNION SELECT 19 UNION SELECT 20 UNION SELECT 21 UNION SELECT 22 UNION SELECT 23) hours ) d LEFT JOIN ( SELECT HOUR(create_time) AS h, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM post WHERE DATE(create_time) = CURDATE() AND deleted = 0 GROUP BY HOUR(create_time) ) p ON d.h = p.h LEFT JOIN ( SELECT HOUR(create_time) AS h, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM comment WHERE DATE(create_time) = CURDATE() AND deleted = 0 GROUP BY HOUR(create_time) ) c ON d.h = c.h LEFT JOIN ( SELECT HOUR(create_time) AS h, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM like_collect WHERE DATE(create_time) = CURDATE() GROUP BY HOUR(create_time) ) lk ON d.h = lk.h ORDER BY d.h ASC

SELECT CASE ai_risk_level WHEN 0 THEN 'UNRATED' WHEN 1 THEN 'LOW' WHEN 2 THEN 'MEDIUM' WHEN 3 THEN 'HIGH' ELSE 'UNKNOWN' END AS level, COUNT(*) AS count FROM report GROUP BY ai_risk_level ORDER BY ai_risk_level ASC
